creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
I noticed an issue with this:

[00:03:59] ===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
[00:03:59] Error: Orphaned: lib/cmake/raylib/raylib-config-version.cmake
[00:03:59] Error: Orphaned: lib/cmake/raylib/raylib-config.cmake
[00:03:59] Error: Orphaned: lib/libraylib.so.2
[00:03:59] ===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
[00:03:59] Error: Missing: lib/libraylib.so.1
[00:03:59] ===> Error: Plist issues found.
